india.title: Quote of the day by Napoleon Bonaparte: 'The throne is only a piece of wood...'
india.summary: Napoleon Bonaparte grasped that real power emerges from the collective imagination and faith of the people. He realized that symbols, like thrones, lack intrinsic authority. This principle of shared belief is fundamental to today’s economies and political structures. When public trust wanes, it leads to the depreciation of institutions and currencies. Ultimately, through the collective memory of society, Napoleon’s legend endured despite the fall of his empire.
